name: 汽車蓄意撞人
description: 反派派人蓄意駕車撞向女主，兄長挺身保護。肉體暴力的直接威脅製造最原始的恐懼感和緊張感。
tags: 車輛高速衝來的驚險畫面+兄長護妹的英勇動作

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: My sister sat down. / As long as my brother is here / I won't let anything happen to you. / They came for me / Miss Qing'er / The plan failed.
examples.context: 車輛高速衝來的驚險畫面+兄長護妹的英勇動作
